evals.prompt: Create a single-page browser tool that reformats JSON and compare whether it should stay one file or split local assets.
evals.expected_output: Guidance that keeps the page browser-only, uses semantic structure, and explains when extracting local assets improves maintainability.
assertions: The response keeps the solution browser-only without introducing a framework by default
The response mentions semantic HTML or clear CSS and JS responsibilities
The response discusses when to keep one file versus extracting local assets

evals.prompt: Review this growing standalone HTML page and tell me how to keep it readable on desktop and mobile.
evals.expected_output: A review that focuses on structure, styling clarity, responsive behavior, and intentional extraction of repeated values or assets.
assertions: The response addresses desktop and mobile behavior
The response names structural or styling readability concerns
The response avoids defaulting to a framework migration
